description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black base and a prominent handle and lever mechanism at the top, made primarily of metal. The body features multiple instructional labels and pictograms, including a large white label with green and red text and icons, as well as a four-panel instruction diagram. A black hose is attached near the top, looping down and secured to the side with a metallic bracket. The nozzle is metallic and extends from the handle, designed for directing the extinguishing agent. The extinguisher's surface is smooth and glossy, with clear, high-contrast signage for emergency use.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black base, metallic handle, and attached black hose, featuring clear instructional labels and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: The extinguisher is seen from an angle showing the top handle, safety pin, and a side label with text and icons.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front instructional diagram with four pictograms and the full length of the black hose attached to the side.
description_view_2: The rear side is visible, showing the hose looping down and secured, with part of the instructional label and the metallic nozzle visible.
description_view_3: The main label with 'AFF FOAM SPRAY' and safety instructions is clearly visible, along with the handle, nozzle, and hose attachment.
attribute_label_or_signage: Multiple labels and instructional markings are present: a large white and green label with text and icons on the front, and a four-panel pictogram instruction diagram on the side.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A metallic bracket is visible securing the hose to the side of the extinguisher; no wall or floor mounting bracket is visible.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, looping down the side and secured with a metallic bracket; a metallic nozzle is attached to the end of the hose.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top, inserted through the handle mechanism.
